title: Sticker Line Challenge
description: Trace dotted waves, zigzags, and loops while a cheerful sticker follows every careful stroke.
learningGoals: Follow a line from left to right with controlled movement
Practice curved, zigzag, circular, and loop pre-writing strokes
Build finger control that supports later pencil use
interactionModel: trace each dotted path continuously with one finger
feedbackModel: Checkpoints sparkle as the child passes them; wandering gets a gentle spoken nudge, and every finished path earns warm praise and a short celebration.
credits: QLOBE Kids contributors; placeholder emoji art (see ASSETS.md).
